[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A mobile app screen shows multiple user profile cards and message/comment overlays on top of an anime-style background image.

Setting:
The image appears to be a smartphone screenshot taken in portrait orientation with a dark user interface overlay. The background contains a blurred anime-style character illustration with muted colors, suggesting the content is displayed behind semi-transparent UI panels. The time of day and weather are unclear.

Visual Details:
The interface is predominantly dark with white text and colored badges. Along the top edge are small status icons and numeric indicators on the left and right. Several stacked comment panels occupy the center of the screen, each containing a circular profile avatar, a display name, a checkmark icon, a level badge, and additional tags. A large blue horizontal banner in the middle has white text and a prominent rounded white button on the right. At the bottom is a dark navigation bar with circular icons and a label reading “timeline,” with a small circular avatar at the far right. The composition is layered, with semi-transparent panels allowing the anime background to show through.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
